title: Leather From the Dead
description: This datapack makes it so rotten flesh can be placed on a campfire to cook it into leather.
body:
## How to use:
1. Get rotten flesh from zombies
2. Place rotten flesh on a campfire
3. Wait
4. Pick up leather from campfire.

## Server usage
Yes you can use this in your server or modpack, the datapack goes in world->datapacks.
